title: Helska IV
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Helska4.jpg]] |name=Helska IV |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Dalonbian sector/Legends|Dalonbian sector]] |system=[[Helska system/Legends|Helska system]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' |coordinates=L-2 |xyz= |distance= |suns=1: [[Helska system's star|Helska]] |orbited= |position=4 |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate=[[Temperature/Legends|Cold]] |gravity= |terrain=[[Water/Legends|Ice]]-covered [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Praetorite Vong]] }} {{Quote|What do we know of that planet?''"
"''There isn't much in the data banks about the Helska system. There's not an easily inhabitable planet among the seven, and no one's taken the time or trouble to build one up. None of them even have names—just Helska 1 to 7.|Researchers Danni Quee and Garth Breise|}} '''Helska IV''', also called '''Helska 4''', '''Helska Four''', or simply '''Helska''', was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Helska system/Legends|Helska system]], located in [[Dalonbian sector/Legends|Dalonbian sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. ==Geography== Helska IV was essentially a shell of [[Water/Legends|ice]] around a vast inner ocean, with occasional pockets of air located in the thick icy crust. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was generally considered inhospitable to life as [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] knew it, and thus had no native life forms. ==History== Helska IV was the site of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] known major foothold in the galaxy. It was here that the [[Praetorite Vong]], comprising the first wave of their invasion, set their own [[yammosk]], or War Coordinator, under the frozen surface. Following the discovery of the Vong on Helska IV by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Solo]] formulated and executed a plan to use a [[shieldship]] to reflect energy back at the planet, thereby stealing the yammosk's energy through evaporation. Though several ships were lost, the plan [[Battle of Helska IV|worked]], and the ice planet's liquid core froze and shattered, [[Death/Legends|killing]] the yammosk and all Yuuzhan Vong, but devastating the planet. ==Appearances== *''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}} *[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime (abridged audiobook)|''The New
